name: Dark Chocolate and Pumpkin Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325°F.
2. Toast pecan pieces in the preheated oven for 6-8 minutes. Let cool to room temperature.
3. Lower oven temperature to 300°F.
4. Chop cookies and pecans into crumbs (20-30 seconds). Set aside.
5. For chocolate cheesecake:
- Melt butter and coat pan bottom.
- Press 1 cup crumbs evenly on the buttered bottom.
- Melt semisweet chocolate with coffee in double boiler for 6-8 minutes.
- Beat cream cheese, sugar, salt, eggs (3), and vanilla until smooth.
- Add melted chocolate mixture; beat until combined.
- Pour batter into prepared pan. Refrigerate while preparing pumpkin cheesecake.
6. For pumpkin cheesecake:
- Melt butter and coat pan inside. Line with parchment paper. Coat paper with remaining butter.
- Beat cream cheese, sugar, flour, salt, eggs (3), vanilla in mixer.
- Add pumpkin puree, spices; beat until smooth.
- Pour mixture into prepared pan. Place pans on center rack.
7. Bake both cheesecakes at 300°F for 1 hour and 10 minutes.
8. Cool cheesecakes at room temperature for 20 minutes.
9. Refrigerate chocolate cheesecake for 1 hour, keep pumpkin cheesecake at room temp.
10. Pour Semisweet Chocolate Ganache over chocolate cheesecake; spread evenly.
11. Invert pumpkin cheesecake onto ganache layer and press gently.
12. Wrap pan in film wrap and refrigerate until set (3 hours).
13. Remove from springform pan, wrap sides with damp towel, let sit 5 minutes.
14. Release cake, smooth sides with remaining ganache, spread top.
15. Refrigerate before serving.
Separate Recipe "Death By Chocolate" Kenan Books, Inc
